# PHASEPushStreamBufferOptions

**Structure**

Options that inform PHASE of an audio-stream buffer’s playback priority.

## Declaration

```swift
struct PHASEPushStreamBufferOptions
```

## Overview

When your app provides audio buffers that PHASE plays through a [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEPushStreamNode], use this structure to inform PHASE of a particular buffer’s priority.

Associate an option to a particular buffer by passing it in to the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEPushStreamNode/scheduleBuffer(buffer:time:options:)] function of a [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEPushStreamNode].

## Creating an Option

- **init(rawValue:)**: Creates a push stream buffer option with the given raw value.

## Options

- **default**: Indicates a buffer processes after existing buffers in the queue.
- **interrupts**: Indicates a buffer begins processing immediately.
- **interruptsAtLoop**: Indicates a buffer begins processing when an existing buffer loops.
- **loops**: Indicates a buffer restarts after it finishes processing.

## Audio-Providing Nodes

- **PHASESamplerNodeDefinition**: A node that plays complete audio data.
- **PHASEPlaybackMode**: Loop options for audio playback.
- **PHASEPushStreamNodeDefinition**: A node that plays a sequence of audio buffers.
- **PHASEPushStreamNode**: An audio stream you manage to provide a sound buffer data.
- **PHASECalibrationMode**: Calibration options for sound pressure level.
- **PHASEGeneratorNodeDefinition**: A base class for nodes that provide audio data to generate sound.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- ExpressibleByArrayLiteral
- OptionSet
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
- SetAlgebra
